query:
SELECT 
  id,
  brandId,
  productId,
  gmv,
  salesAmount,
  streamerName,
  livestreamDate
FROM brand_livestreams
WHERE brandId = 180005
ORDER BY livestreamDate DESC
LIMIT 10;
